parallelGroups.notes: Read-only discovery can run in shared workspace or isolated worker mode.
Peak useful wave: coordinator keeps DDD-C00 local while six OSG writers and four DDD read-only explorers run in isolated mode.
Core DDD first wave has three context writers; spare writer slots may be filled only by unfinished P1 OSG workers with disjoint reservations.
CDP, BI, conversation, and template docs/catalog can run together when reservations stay disjoint.
Do not run DDD-W08 here. Frontend/doc workers require exact editor file reservations.
Do not run backend OSG ecosystem workers against execution-owned files in this wave.
Six official plugin workers can run together after G10 evidence because each owns one plugin package, one test package, and one docs file.
